Property: condensed Fukui indices f⁺ (electrophilic attack), f⁻ (nucleophilic attack), f⁰ (radical attack) and dual descriptor for every atom in acrolein; headline value reported here is the largest electrophilic index f⁺.
Level of theory: DFT, tier "standard" = B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density-fitting), as implemented in PySCF 2.x via chemkit.

Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent requested).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).  N±1 states for the Fukui finite-difference used charge ±1 and doublet multiplicity (automatically selected).
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (engine subcommand `fukui`, PySCF backend) on 2026-07-04.
